overview.value: Commercial Remote Sensing Regulatory Affairs (CRSRA) is a division of the Office of Space Commerce. CRSRA licenses private operators of remote sensing space systems and monitors compliance with the law, regulations, and license terms. It works with other United States Government agencies to preserve essential U.S. national security interests and international obligations by assuring licensee compliance.

focus.value: CRSRA licenses private operators of remote sensing space systems and monitors compliance with the law, regulations, and license terms.
